title: Dynamic String Builder
description: Implement a dynamic string builder in C that efficiently handles string concatenation with automatic buffer resizing.
requirements: Implement sb_create() returning new builder with initial capacity
Implement sb_append(sb, str) appending null-terminated string
Implement sb_append_char(sb, c) appending single character
Implement sb_append_fmt(sb, fmt, ...) for formatted append
Implement sb_to_string(sb) returning owned null-terminated string
Double capacity on resize for amortized O(1) appends

few_shot_examples.prompt: Ensure buffer has capacity for additional bytes.
